title: M20 Flat Penny Washer (Pack of 10) Plain Wide Round Metal Alloy Steel Washers for Screws – Zinc Coated Plated Galvanized Heavy Duty According to Standart ISO7089 DIN125 M20 (21mm x 37mm)
features: HIGH-QUALITY STEEL: These Flat Washers are Zinc Plated Alloy Steel which is one of the highest forms of corrosion-resistant steel, making it last longer than other hardware on the market today.
WASHERS THAT YOU CAN DEPEND ON: Our hardware is very strong and is great for both indoor and outdoor use. The steel is superior to regular steel and has great anti-corrosion properties.

GREAT TO KEEP AROUND: Metal Steel hardware is great to have around for use in wood and wet environments. Metal Steel washers are the highest quality available on the market and we stand by our claim 100%. They are strong, corrosion resistant and will support all of your projects.
SECURE HOLD - Flat washers you can trust to prevent pull through. Our washers offer a flat bearing surface that distributes the weight ensuring a secure hold.

DIMENSIONS: Inside diameter, outside diameter and thickness please refer to pictures. Material: Zinc Plated Alloy Steel. Standard: DIN EN ISO 125, ISO 7089; CSN 021702; PN 82006; UNI 6592. M20. Pack of 10.
